balance.empty: No balances yet. Add your first expense!

settle.youMarked: You marked {{amt}} paid to {{to}}, awaiting approval
settle.unknownError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

iban.requestConfirm: Send IBAN request to {{name}}? They'll enter their IBAN and it will be shared with you.
iban.disclaimer: IBAN is only shared for this request, never persisted.
iban.remindMessage: Groopay reminder: You owe {{to}} {{amt}} in {{group}}. Don't forget to pay!

group.deleteConfirm: This group and all its expenses will be permanently deleted.
group.leaveConfirm: Are you sure you want to leave? Your expense history remains.
group.leaveSoloFounder: No other members to transfer ownership to. You need to delete the group to leave.
group.transferRequired: You're the founder. Transfer ownership to another member before leaving.

expense.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this expense?
expense.noExpenses: No expenses in this group yet.

auth.devNotice: Temporary sign-in — real Google / Apple sign-in coming soon

step1.title: Split expenses easily
step1.description: Groceries, bills, rent... Split all group expenses fairly. Equal, custom, or subset — however you want.

step2.title: Who owes whom?
step2.description: See net balances instantly. Get smart suggestions to settle debts with the fewest transactions.

step3.title: Remind, stay square
step3.description: One-tap reminders for debtors. Dual-sided payment confirmations — no one forgets.

members.title: Members
members.ghostFounderOnly: Only the group founder can add ghost members.
members.inviteHint: Share the invite code to let people join the group.
members.addGhostDesc: Add someone who doesn't use the app
members.removeConfirm: Remove from group? History is preserved.
members.removeLastFounder: At least one founder must remain.
members.claimTitle: Who are you in this group?

groups.emptySubtitle: Create your first group or join with an invite code!

paywall.title: Go Pro
paywall.subtitle: Manage all your groups in one place, create unlimited groups.

features.dashboard: View all groups in one dashboard

paywall.userProDesc: Monthly subscription — Pro in all your groups
paywall.userProDetail: Pro features in all your groups + unlimited group creation + personal dashboard and category analytics.
paywall.limitNote: You've reached the 5-group limit. Go Pro for unlimited groups.
paywall.userProSuccess: Upgraded to Pro! All Pro features are now active.
paywall.noProduct: Could not load product info. Please try again later.
paywall.devBuildMessage: Purchases are only available in the real app build (dev build). Cannot test in Expo Go.
paywall.devBuildNotice: Purchases active in dev build — cannot test in Expo Go
paywall.alreadyProSub: All Pro features are active on your account.
paywall.finePrint: Purchases are processed through Apple/Google. Restoration is always available.

dashboard.title: Panel
dashboard.emptySub: Create your first group and start adding expenses!
dashboard.otherCurrencyNote: Note: Only {{currency}} expenses shown. Other currencies calculated separately.

account.title: Account
account.signOutConfirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?
account.userProActive: Your Pro membership is active — all groups have Pro features.
account.freeStatusDesc: You can create up to 5 groups. Go Pro for unlimited groups and premium features.
account.deleteWarning: Your account and all data (groups, expenses, memberships) will be permanently deleted. This CANNOT be undone.
account.deleteError: Could not delete account. Please try again.
account.founderGroupsBlock: Before deleting your account, you must transfer ownership of: {{groups}}

balance.empty: No balances yet. Add your first expense!
balance.overallMixed: owed in some, owe in others

groupDetail.title: Group Detail
groupDetail.tip1: Expenses tab shows all group spending — add new ones with the + button.
groupDetail.tip2: Balances tab shows who owes whom and how much.
groupDetail.tip3: Simplified view suggests the fewest transactions to settle all debts.
groupDetail.tip4: Tap an expense to see details (who paid what, notes).

addExpense.title: Add Expense
addExpense.tip1: Enter amount and select currency — different currencies are tracked separately.
addExpense.tip2: Equal: split evenly. Custom: per-person amounts. Subset: only selected members.
addExpense.tip3: The payer is the one who actually paid — they can also be part of the split.
addExpense.tip4: Tap the calendar icon to change the date (defaults to today).

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.tip1: Use the currency selector to view TRY, EUR, USD expenses separately.
dashboard.tip2: Category breakdown and trend chart show expenses in the selected currency.
dashboard.tip3: Pro unlocks detailed analysis: top payer, debt/credit summary, most active month.
dashboard.tip4: Currencies are never mixed — each currency is calculated separately.

balances.title: Balances
balances.tip1: Green = you're owed, Red = you owe.
balances.tip2: Currencies are shown separately, never converted.
balances.tip3: Tap 'I Paid' — once confirmed, balances update.
balances.tip4: Use 'Request IBAN' to get bank details instantly (never saved).

members.title: Member Management
members.tip1: Ghost member: someone without the app. Founder adds them, later claimable via invite.
members.tip2: Share the invite link to bring real users into the group.
members.tip3: Only the founder can add ghost members; anyone can create an invite link.
